prompt: A premium 3D stylized mobile MMORPG game UI icon for 'Bella Coin Exchange Shop' entry button, square 1:1 composition with fully transparent background. COMPOSITION HIERARCHY (very important): the SHOP KIOSK is the HERO/MAIN subject filling about 75% of the frame and must be FULLY VISIBLE and clearly readable; the Bella Coin is a SMALL SECONDARY accent (only about 25-30% of the frame size) floating ABOVE the kiosk like a signboard emblem, NOT overlapping or blocking the kiosk body. SHOP KIOSK DESIGN (fully visible): an ornate fantasy exchange counter with a tall gracefully-curved arch awning in polished silver metal trim and deep purple velvet fabric roof, a wide polished wooden/stone counter base in muted purple-brown tones with carved decorative panels, an open display window/shelf in the middle of the counter where small silver gem trinkets or wrapped gift boxes are shown, two small silver oil lanterns hanging from the front arch corners, two amethyst crystal clusters on the counter front corners, soft inner glow from inside the kiosk. The kiosk should read clearly as a 'magical auction/exchange shop'. BELLA COIN (small accent, placed ABOVE the arch like a floating emblem/signboard, does NOT overlap the counter body): the Bella Coin from the reference image — silver rim, purple face, white letter B with cyclic exchange arrows — small, tilted, glowing softly, clearly readable as the shop's currency logo. DECORATIVE: a few tiny sparkle stars around the coin, soft radial purple glow from the kiosk interior, subtle light motes. STRICT COLORS: NO GOLD, NO YELLOW, NO BRONZE anywhere. Only SILVER / PLATINUM / WHITE metals + DEEP PURPLE / VIOLET / AMETHYST / LAVENDER + muted purple-brown wood/stone + white/cyan sparkles. STYLE: polished 3D cel-shaded game UI icon, vibrant, clean crisp edges, matching Genshin Impact / Honkai Star Rail / AFK Arena UI icon quality. Fully transparent PNG background, ONE SINGLE icon composition centered in frame, no scene backdrop, no text labels, no watermark, no grid.
